prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: 2x2 character action sheet for chroma-key extraction
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style and character reference; preserve the three original monk identities, clothing colors, proportions and paper textures
Primary request: exactly four equal cells in a 2x2 grid. Cell 1: three monks in a clear relay line passing water buckets. Cell 2: three monks together throwing water forward with a simple opaque paper water splash. Cell 3: three monks cooperatively installing a simple wooden pulley and rope. Cell 4: three monks smiling beside a full water jar, each holding a small tool or bucket.
Style/medium: same handcrafted Chinese cut-paper collage characters as Image 1
Composition/framing: every figure full body and fully inside its cell; no character crosses a boundary; consistent identities and relative scale across all cells
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat uniform solid #00ff00 chroma-key in every cell, no texture, shadow, gradient, floor or reflection
Constraints: complete hands and feet, respectful robes, child-friendly action, no scary fire, no text, no labels, no borders, no logo, no watermark; do not use #00ff00 inside subjects
